title: V1LogLine
description: Hatchet V1LogLine entity, derived from the Hatchet OpenAPI spec.

createdAt.description: The creation date of the log line.

taskExternalId.description: The external ID of the task associated with the log line.

taskDisplayName.description: The display name of the task associated with the log line.

retryCount.description: The retry count of the log line.

attempt.description: The attempt number of the log line.
